prompt:
A 3D printer on a tidy workbench with a neat lineup of exactly 10 finished Benchy boat models arranged in a row along the front edge of the table. The Benchies are printed in a few different filament colors but kept in a single straight line so they’re easy to count at a glance. The printer’s build plate shows one more Benchy either just completed or nearly finished, emphasizing that the printer has been running repeatedly to reach the 10-print goal.

Near-future solarpunk workshop aesthetic with warm ambient lighting, clean cable management, a couple of small plants, and maybe a tiny solar gadget on a shelf. Photorealistic 512×512 rendering with no brand logos or legible text on the printer. The composition should clearly communicate “10 Benchies printed” as a stepping stone toward high-output printing.
